problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: Combining Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
